props.title: Building a React Page Builder: An Introduction to Puck
props.description: Puck enables you to create your own page builder and embed it directly inside your React application. Tell Puck what components you support, and Puck will provide a slick drag-and-drop interface for you or your content teams to create pages on-the-fly.

props.title: Building a React Page Builder: An Introduction to Puck
props.author: Chris Villa
props.standfirst: _[Puck](https://puckeditor.com) is the open-source visual editor for React, empowering the next generation of page builders and no-code products. Give us a star on [GitHub](https://github.com/measuredco/puck)! ⭐️_
